'''lakuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamorato|enamorato]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamorato|enamorato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lakuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækijith|lækijith]] || [[word:lækijij|lækijij]] || [[word:lækijish|lækijish]] || [[word:lækiji|lækiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakukujuth|lakukujuth]] || [[word:lakukujuj|lakukujuj]] || [[word:lakukujush|lakukujush]] || [[word:lakukuju|lakukuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakujuth|lakujuth]] || [[word:lakujuj|lakujuj]] || [[word:lakujush|lakujush]] || [[word:lakuju|lakuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakufjuth|lakufjuth]] || [[word:lakufjuj|lakufjuj]] || [[word:lakufjush|lakufjush]] || [[word:lakufjuf|lakufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakujuthu|lakujuthu]] || [[word:lakujuju|lakujuju]] || [[word:lakujushu|lakujushu]] || [[word:lakujuku|lakujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakujuth|lakujuth]] || [[word:lakujuj|lakujuj]] || [[word:lakujush|lakujush]] || [[word:lakuju|lakuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakujuthul|lakujuthul]] || [[word:lakujujul|lakujujul]] || [[word:lakujushul|lakujushul]] || [[word:lakujukul|lakujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakujuthuthu|lakujuthuthu]] || [[word:lakujujuju|lakujujuju]] || [[word:lakujushushu|lakujushushu]] || [[word:lakujuku|lakujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakujuthun|lakujuthun]] || [[word:lakujujun|lakujujun]] || [[word:lakujushun|lakujushun]] || [[word:lakujukun|lakujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakujuthuoro|lakujuthuoro]] || [[word:lakujujuoro|lakujujuoro]] || [[word:lakujushuoro|lakujushuoro]] || [[word:lakujukuoro|lakujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
